Best Free Alternatives to GitHub Copilot (2026)

Looking for a free or cheaper alternative to GitHub Copilot? Here are the top options.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

✅ Free tier available

Cursor

An AI-first code editor built around chat, autocomplete, and codebase-aware edits.

✅ Free tier available
